title: Senior Doctor - Roche India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Roche India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Roche India has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Jaipur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Roche India:
Roche India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Roche India!
